prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-scope-drift/plan.md. Assume staged files are src/staged_api.ts and docs/staged_notes.md, unstaged files are src/unstaged_service.ts, and untracked file is scripts/new_check.sh. A reviewer subagent proposes reviewing only src/staged_api.ts. Produce Code Review Findings that prevents scope drift.
assertions: Materializes review_scope_files from staged + unstaged + untracked files
States subagents must not recompute or narrow scope independently
Reports missing files when subset review is proposed
Applies Completion Gate INCOMPLETE when Missing Files > 0
